name: Bin Stock Ledgers
query:
SELECT
sle.posting_date AS "Date:Date:120",
sle.item_code AS "Item:Link/Item:150",
sle.warehouse AS "Warehouse:Link/Warehouse:150",
wb.bin_code AS "Warehouse Bin:Data:150",
sle.actual_qty AS "Qty Change:Float:120",
sle.qty_after_transaction AS "Balance Qty:Float:120",
sle.voucher_type AS "Voucher Type:Data:120",
sle.voucher_no AS "Voucher No:Dynamic Link/voucher_type:150"
FROM `tabStock Ledger Entry` sle
LEFT JOIN `tabWarehouse Bin` wb
ON sle.custom_warehouse_bin = wb.name
ORDER BY sle.posting_date DESC
